summary: The source-fidelity lane is acceptable for this lifecycle repair. The candidate only creates a repair candidate and updates the broad senolytics coverage candidate's lifecycle and summary to match existing needs_revision source-review findings; it does not alter source, study, finding, outcome, result, snapshot, or extraction records.

findings.claim_or_issue: The repaired senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 summary preserves the existing source_fidelity needs_revision state, including the open full-text-extraction-pending major finding on the underlying broad candidate.
findings.why_it_matters: Accepting this source_fidelity lane for the lifecycle repair must not be interpreted as clearing source support for the broad senolytics evidence slice.
findings.recommended_action: Keep senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 in needs_revision until a narrower source and extraction repair closes the underlying open source-fidelity finding.

findings.claim_or_issue: The candidate-revision repair proposes only candidate_change record changes and does not create, update, accept, or release any source-facing evidence record.
findings.why_it_matters: The source_fidelity review can be complete for this lane without re-auditing every PubMed, registry, text-snapshot, or result locator in the broad coverage candidate.
findings.recommended_action: Limit this acceptance to the lifecycle repair scope and require separate source-fidelity review for any future candidate that changes source, snapshot, extraction, or provenance records.

findings.claim_or_issue: The target repair candidate still needs the remaining required supervisor lanes before it can become promotion-ready.
findings.why_it_matters: A single accepting source_fidelity lane does not complete extraction_fidelity, taxonomy_mapping, synthesis_boundary, or safety_limitations review for this repair candidate.
findings.recommended_action: Leave candidate-revision-senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21-repair unpromoted until every required active review lane is complete and accepting.
